override_rule: Count, MaxCycleRuntimeMinutes, MaxTotalRuntimeMinutes, MaxCycles, StopFile, and RequireRepoClean can be supplied at launch. MaxRuntimeMinutes remains an alias for MaxCycleRuntimeMinutes.
boundary: Default autonomous school cycle is 50000 candidates with 60 minutes max per cycle. If one cycle exceeds SLA, the next cycle is not started. V1 does not hard-kill an active school run.
